cli: make the README a bit clearer

setup.content:
# antfarm-write-test

this is a scratch repo we use for testing stuff, it has some files and does things and is used for testing the antfarm builder loop and other things too.

notes: Spec also calls for 'plan has 3 or fewer steps'. main.rs's headless forge path never prints the Planner's raw plan text to stdout/stderr (only the final Reviewer note + diff on success, or a one-line NEEDS YOU on stderr) -- there is no observable plan text to count steps from today, so that check is omitted rather than faked. See eval report.
